scenes.narration: Bhai sun, ye Design: Payment System (Razorpay/Stripe) ki ek mistake teri ₹50-80LPA ki Razorpay offer cancel kara dega.
Without understanding Design: Payment System (Razorpay/Stripe), systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Design: Payment System (Razorpay/Stripe) like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Design: Payment System (Razorpay/Stripe): it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Design: Payment System (Razorpay/Stripe): fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Design: Payment System (Razorpay/Stripe) to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Design: Payment System (Razorpay/Stripe) solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
